title: Fast Grass 3D
description: Enhances Better Grass with subtle 3D detail and pebble patches — fast, vanilla, and compatible.
body:
**Fast Foliage** recreates OptiFine’s Better Grass (fast) using only vanilla block models and enhances it with lightweight 3D foliage and pebble patches.

It makes grass and related blocks use their top texture on the sides while adding subtle 3D details to make the world feel more alive — without killing your FPS.
### Affected Blocks
- Grass Block 
- Snowy Grass Block
- Dirt Path
- Podzol
- Mycelium
- Warped Nylium
- Crimson Nylium

Dirt paths have a special feature: they visually extend to the block below, creating smoother and more seamless village roads.

This pack uses only adjusted vanilla block models — no custom textures or mod assets — for maximum compatibility.

### FAQ
**Q: Does this work with my resource pack?**
A: Yes. It is designed to stay compatible with other resource packs.

**Q: Do I need any mods to use this?**
A: No. This pack works in pure vanilla.

**Q: Does the 3D foliage affect performance?**
A: No. All 3D details are low-poly and optimized to stay fast.

**Q: How does this compare to similar packs?**
This resource pack:
- Uses only block models (no textures)
- Requires no mods
- Works alongside packs that modify block models
- Includes down-spreading dirt paths
- Adds lightweight 3D foliage and pebble patches
- Preserves Better Grass performance behavior
